name: Planet Miner
short_description: Remove fog, look for and mine minerals, construct buildings, upgrade the rover and reach the portal.
detailed_description:
The Planet Miner is a game about planet colonization. In Planet Miner, you play as rover tasked with finding mineral and building base on alien planet.
Build new structures, upgrade your rover and rech to the portal.

KEY FEATURES

The Minerals is a main resours in game. You must find them in the Fog. If you dont find all minerals in area, after load game fog cover all area again.

Rover consum energy. You can charge rover on base. Try find minerals before energy will be end.
